headline: FDA Clears First Over-The-Counter Continuous Glucose Monitor For Children

raw.headline: FDA Clears First Over-The-Counter Continuous Glucose Monitor For Children

headline: DexCom Expands Beyond CGMs With CONNECT Results AI Apps And Nutrisense Deal
summary: DexCom (NasdaqGS:DXCM) reported new clinical data from its CONNECT trial on the Dexcom G7 continuous glucose monitoring system in adults with Type 2 diabetes not using insulin. The company introduced product updates, including an AI-enabled reimagined app experience and the Stelo app focused on metabolic health. DexCom also announced a planned acquisition of Nutrisense to expand its personalized nutrition and metabolic health guidance offering. DexCom is best known for continuous glucose...
